wine_retailers.name: Vinum Colmar
wine_retailers.address: 15 Place de la Cathedrale, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_retailers.description: Independent caviste on Place de la Cathedrale in Colmar's old town opposite the cathedral, strong Alsace selection alongside French regional bottles and a curated international and spirits range.
wine_retailers.speciality: Alsace grower-direct, French regional crus, artisanal spirits

wine_retailers.name: La Sommeliere
wine_retailers.address: 19 Place de la Cathedrale, 68000 Colmar, France
wine_retailers.description: Cathedral-square caviste in Colmar with a wide Alsace selection and a curated regional French and international range of still and sparkling wines.

wine_retailers.name: Theatre du Vin Colmar
wine_retailers.description: Certified-organic caviste and wine bar on Route de Neuf-Brisach with more than 3,000 bottles. Wine tasting events, charcuterie boards and a 300 sqm hangar of cellar stock.
wine_retailers.speciality: Certified organic and biodynamic wines, spirits and beer

wine_retailers.name: Cavavin Colmar
wine_retailers.description: Colmar branch of the Cavavin caviste group, more than 500 wine, champagne and spirits references run by independent wine merchant Guillaume Barsotti.

wine_retailers.name: Vino Strada Cave
wine_retailers.address: 1 Rue du Temple Neuf, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_retailers.description: Vino Strada's primary cellar near the cathedral, more than 4,000 references with deep focus on organic, biodynamic and natural growers from Alsace and across France.
wine_retailers.speciality: Natural and biodynamic wines, artisan growers

wine_retailers.name: La Cave du Sommelier
wine_retailers.address: 28 Rue du Marechal Foch, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_retailers.description: Caviste, spirits and grocery in Strasbourg's Neustadt with a strong Alsace and Champagne backbone alongside a wide international and spirits range.
wine_retailers.speciality: Alsace appellation wines, Champagne, fine spirits

wine_retailers.name: L'Epicier Grand Cru
wine_retailers.description: Strasbourg cheese-and-wine caviste specialising in natural, organic and biodynamic bottles. Sit-down tastings with artisanal cheese and seasonal small plates.
wine_retailers.speciality: Natural and biodynamic wine, artisanal cheese

wine_retailers.name: Au Fil du Vin Libre
wine_retailers.description: Jean Walch's natural-wine caviste on the Quai des Bateliers, around 800 references including Alsatian grape varieties plus Burgundy, Bordeaux and Corsica without sulfites added.

wine_retailers.name: Le Cellier des Boulevards
wine_retailers.address: 23 Boulevard de la Marne, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_retailers.description: Husband-and-wife caviste in the Orangerie quarter with more than 2,000 references of wine, sake, whisky, rum and spirits, a notable Japanese sake specialty.
wine_retailers.speciality: Wine, Japanese sake and fine spirits

wine_retailers.name: Boutique Vini
wine_retailers.address: 27 Rue du General de Gaulle, 68340 Riquewihr, France
wine_retailers.description: Caviste opened by the Hugel family in 2005 on Riquewihr's main street with more than 2,900 French and international references at the top of their appellations.

verified.address_quoted: 27, rue du General de Gaulle 68340 Riquewihr
